title: Suraj Pe Mangal Bhari
desc: Rejected by many potential brides, Suraj soon discovers the reason behind it.

title: Kanjoos Makkichoos
desc: Jamnaprasad Pandey's parents vanish in a flood, devastating him.

title: Tarla
desc: Tarla Dalal takes us on an inspirational journey to change the country's culinary landscape.

title: Saina
desc: Saina Nehwal, a badminton star, reaches the pinnacle of her sport.

title: Mrs. Chatterjee vs Norway
desc: An Indian woman fights for justice after Norwegian authorities take her children away.

title: Chhatriwali
desc: While struggling to find work, Sanya takes a job that challenges social norms.

title: Tehran
desc: An officer tries to expose the truth about an explosive detonation within Delhi in 2012.

title: Hotel Mumbai
desc: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack.

title: Hotel Mumbai
desc: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack.

title: U-Turn
desc: Mysterious deaths occur on a flyover after illegal U-turns, and journalist-intern Radhika investigates. However, a twist makes her the prime suspect, forcing her to clear her name.

title: U-Turn
desc: A journalist is accused of murdering one of the traffic offenders she was investigating.

title: The Last Color
desc: 9-year-old Choti wishes to attend school but she faces struggle for daily survival. She befriends a widow who lives a life of abstinence. She later becomes an advocate and fights for societal reforms.

title: The Last Color
desc: A young tightrope walker befriends a widow who wishes to play Holi but cannot do so.

title: Joggers Park
desc: Jenny, a confident single woman, lives life on her own terms. Everything changes when a retired judge unexpectedly falls for her and enters her world.

title: Joggers' Park
desc: Chaos erupts when former judge Jyotin Chatterjee falls for Jenny, a young woman.

title: Iqbal
desc: Iqbal, an impaired yet talented boy, reaches out to a former cricket player to train him.

title: Rock On 2
desc: Adi and Magik face obstacles hosting a charity concert due to local authorities.

title: Dhadak
desc: A young couple's love transcends class and blooms despite their families' disapproval.

title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
desc: The Indian Army retaliates against militants who attacked an army base in Uri in 2016.

title: Firaaq
desc: The victims of the 2002 Gujarat riots grapple with the aftermath of the devastation.

title: Yudhra
desc: A vengeful youth infiltrates a dangerous cartel to avenge the death of his parents.

title: English Vinglish
desc: An efficient housewife who is unable to speak in English endures insults from her family.

title: Welcome To New York
desc: An unexpected trip to New York City sets a duo off on a comic adventure that changes their lives forever.

title: Sniff
desc: An anosmic boy gains super smell powers and uses them to fight crime, turning into a pint-sized superhero with humor and noble purpose.

title: Lost
